recommendations.title: Girlfight
recommendations.overview: Diana Guzman, a troubled Brooklyn teenager, decides to channel her aggression by training to become a boxer, all while keeping it a secret from her father.

recommendations.title: XX
recommendations.overview: This all-female horror anthology features four dark tales from four fiercely talented women.
recommendations.director: Roxanne Benjamin, St. Vincent, Jovanka Vuckovic, Karyn Kusama

recommendations.title: Destroyer
recommendations.overview: When Erin Bell was a young cop, she was given an undercover assignment that ended badly and destroyed her life. Years later, she must face her demons in order to make peace with her past.

recommendations.title: Pleasantville
recommendations.overview: Geeky teenager David and his popular twin sister, Jennifer, get sucked into the black-and-white world of a 1950s TV sitcom called "Pleasantville," and find a world where everything is peachy keen all the time. But when Jennifer's modern attitude disr

recommendations.title: House
recommendations.overview: Hoping to find a sense of connection to her late mother, Gorgeous takes a trip with her friends to visit her aunt's ancestral house in the countryside. The girls soon discover that there is more to the old house than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: The Cleansing Hour
recommendations.overview: Two millennial entrepreneurs stage elaborate fake exorcisms on social media until one of their girlfriends becomes possessed by a demon.

recommendations.title: Blame It on Rio
